main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'improperly seated O-ring interconnector Tubo 4 T-02 + brine leakage' literal.

alternatives.justification: 2 alts breves (daño CIP, sello adaptador permeado).

recommended_action.justification: Aislar Tubo 4 + reemplazar O-rings + lubricante + prueba presión — match gold.

requested_data.justification: Pide perfil conductividad permeato a lo largo vaso (probe test) — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi: O-rings intactos o subida gradual → switch.
